Global.title: Tydedev | Brand Identity & Graphic Design
Global.description: Maria Basso's portfolio: graphic design, brand identity, book and ebook design, and web development focused on structured layouts, clean design and UX.

Home.about:
Visual identities for companies and professionals, with cohesive graphic systems for both digital and print use.

Web design and development combined into a single service to transform ideas into clear, functional, and communication-driven visual solutions.
Home.CTA: If you have a project in mind or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!

Profile.title: Maria Basso | Graphic designer and web developer
Profile.description: Graphic designer and web developer based in Italy. Based in Torre del Greco (NA), Italy and open to remote work opportunities.
Profile.intro: With a detail-oriented approach, I create brand identities from scratch, translating the client’s vision into visual materials.
Profile.availability: Available for remote work for US, Canada and Worldwide.
Profile.activity_1: Managed a personal Instagram account showcasing 3D illustrations and 3D animations, achieving over 11k views.
Profile.activity_2: Volunteered as a Logo Designer for a non-profit stage theater company and sports podcast.
Profile.activity_3: Creative Writing for a non-profit Cultural Magazine, producing short stories focused on Art History, artists, and artistic movements.
Profile.activity_4: Photographer and Graphic Designer for Cultural Events in Milan.

GraphicDesign.title: Graphic Design Portfolio
GraphicDesign.description: Visual materials created for clients, including logos, brochures, websites, and social media graphics.

Works.title: Brand identities, logos, websites and social media graphics — Tydedev
Works.description: A selection of projects showcasing my skills in graphic design and web development. Projects include logos, brand identities, stationery, websites, and digital and print assets.
Works.intro: Projects include logos, brand identities, stationery, websites, and digital and print assets.

Bascorp.title: Project: Bascorp
Bascorp.description: Bascorp is a new company in the construction and renovation field. Their purpose is to be a reliable partner for their clients’ projects, and to have a strong and recognizable identity across all touchpoints.
Bascorp.intro: Bascorp is a new company in the construction and renovation field. Their purpose is to be a reliable partner for their clients’ projects, and to have a strong and recognizable identity across all touchpoints.
Bascorp.detail: I designed the website and developed it with Next.js, obtaining a fully responsive and scalable product.

Stasi.title: Project Concept: Stasifood
Stasi.description: Stasifood is an Italian bakery brand specializing in premium products positioned as elegant holiday gift options.
Stasi.intro: Stasifood is an Italian bakery brand specializing in premium products positioned as elegant holiday gift options.
Stasi.detail: The redesigned packaging improves product recognition while creating a clearer and more premium shelf presence. The guarantee seal graphic evokes craftsmanship and authenticity, reinforcing trust in the brand’s quality.

Boeing.title: Indipendent Commission: Editable Poster
Boeing.description: I created a poster for a client who needed editable Figma files for their Etsy activity.
Boeing.intro: The client is an Etsy seller who needed editable Figma files for their activity. The project required me to design a poster in which the characteristics of the plane were listed.
Boeing.detail: The client explicitly requested that I imitate the International Typographic Style, known as the Swiss Style. The result is a completely editable Figma file that can be used to design other posters.

EpubConversion.title: EPUB Design & Ebook Publishing for Digital Editorial Content
EpubConversion.type: EPUB design and digital publishing service
EpubConversion.description: EPUB design and ebook publishing service optimized for digital reading platforms such as Kindle, Kobo, and Apple Books. Ideal for publishers, independent authors, and professionals who need structured, accessible, and standards-compliant digital publications based on W3C guidelines.
EpubConversion.intro: EPUB design and ebook publishing for digital authors and publishers
EpubConversion.info1: Design and structuring of EPUB files optimized for Kindle, Kobo, and Apple Books, with a focus on semantic structure and accessibility.
EpubConversion.info2: EPUB files built according to W3C standards to ensure compatibility, performance, and accessibility across all major digital reading platforms.
EpubConversion.ideal_for: Ideal for publishers, independent authors, and professionals looking to publish structured digital content in EPUB format.
EpubConversion.contact: Get in touch to discuss your project and receive a tailored quote.
